doc-welcome.content:
# LoreBinder Project
> #### by Author Name

---
## Introduction
Welcome to LoreBinder. This starter document follows a Homebrewery-style flow while keeping your project in a multi-file structure.

### Quick Start
- Write markdown in the left code editor.
- Edit from the right view editor when you want to work in context.
- Open `base.css` in the file tree to adjust your project's base styling.

---
## Chapter 1 | Getting Started
This is a sample section for your setting, adventure, or sourcebook.

> ### Sidebar
> Use sidebars for lore notes, callouts, and reminders.
